zh.lifeSummary: Giles Lengingour是Richard Lenginour和Agnes FitzRichard de Pulford的兒子，於1290年出生在英國英格蘭。他於大約1309年與Susanna Skipton在英國萊希斯特斯爾貝爾格拉福結婚。他們至少是1個兒子的父母。他去世於1340年享年50歲，埋葬在英國。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: Giles Lengingour是Richard Lenginour和Agnes FitzRichard de Pulford的儿子，于1290年出生在英国英格兰。他于大约1309年与Susanna Skipton在英国萊希斯特斯爾貝爾格拉福结婚。他们至少是1个儿子的父母。他去世于1340年享年50岁，埋葬在英国。

nameMeanings.name: Giles
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Much altered English vernacular form of the Late Latin name Aegidius, from Greek Aigidios (a derivative of aigidion ‘kid, young goat’), via Old French Gide. It was the name of an 8th‐century saint who, according to tradition, was an Athenian citizen who fled to Provence because he could not cope with the fame and adulation caused by his power to work miracles, in particular by healing the lame and crippled. This was not a particularly common name in the Middle Ages and its use seems to have been confined to certain families and localities.

historicEvents.title: Jews Expelled From England
historicEvents.description: After years of anti-Semitic behavior, King Edward I expelled Jews from England in 1290.

historicEvents.title: Famine Strikes Europe
historicEvents.description: A famine caused by cold winters and wet summers across Europe caused millions to die due to starvation. Desperation from hunger caused high levels of crime, stampedes in bread lines in London, infanticide, and even cannibalism throughout Europe.

historicEvents.title: First War of Scottish Independence
historicEvents.description: The First War of Scottish Independence began after England invaded Scotland in 1296. The Treaty of Edinburgh was signed in 1328 which declared peace between the two kingdoms and brought the war to an end.

historicEvents.title: The Hundred Years' War
historicEvents.description: The Hundred Years' War between France and England was largely due to the question of legitimate succession to the French crown.

en.lifeSummary: Giles Lengingour was born in 1290, in England, United Kingdom as the son of Richard Lenginour and Agnes FitzRichard de Pulford. He married Susanna Skipton about 1309, in Belgrave, Leicestershire, England. They were the parents of at least 1 son. He died in 1340, at the age of 50, and was buried in England.

fr.lifeSummary: Giles Lengingour est né en 1290, à Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, fils de Richard Lenginour et Agnes FitzRichard de Pulford. Il a épousé Susanna Skipton environ 1309, à Belgrave, Leicestershire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils. Il est décédé en 1340, à l’âge de 50 ans, et a été enterré à Angleterre.

it.lifeSummary: Giles Lengingour è nato il nel 1290 nel Inghilterra, Regno Unito come figlio di Richard Lenginour e Agnes FitzRichard de Pulford. Lui sposato Susanna Skipton circa 1309, nel Belgrave, Leicestershire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio. Morì nel 1340, all'età di 50 anni, e fu sepolto a England.

ja.lifeSummary: Giles Lengingourは1290年にイギリスイギリスでRichard LenginourとAgnes FitzRichard de Pulfordの息子として生まれた。約1309年にイギリスレアイセステルシュアイアベルグラブでSusanna Skiptonと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子の親であった。彼は1340年に50歳で死去し，イギリスにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Giles Lengingour(은)는 1290년 영국 잉글랜드에서 Richard Lenginour(와)과 Agnes FitzRichard de Pulford의 아들로 태어났다. 그는 대략 1309년 영국 레이스스터실르 벨그레이브에서 Susanna Skipton(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1340년 50세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국에 묻혔다.

Ele casou-se com Susanna Skipton aproximadamente 1309, em Belgrave, Leicestershire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho. Ele faleceu em 1340, com 50 anos, e foi sepultado em Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Giles Lengingour родился в 1290 г. в местности Англия, Великобритания. Его родителей звали Richard Lenginour и Agnes FitzRichard de Pulford. Он женился на женщине по имени Susanna Skipton около 1309 г. в местности белграв, лисестиршир, Англия. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын. Он умер в 1340 г. в возрасте 50 лет и был похоронен в местности Англия.
